<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Claude" version="24.7.17"> <diagram name="uds-slide-apdu" id="uds-slide-apdu"> <mxGraphModel dx="985" dy="1642" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="960" pageHeight="250" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="n1" parent="1" vertex="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=15;fontColor=#14337a;fontFamily=DejaVu Sans;fontStyle=1;" value="A_PDU — Application layer Protocol Data Unit (Clause 7.2)"> <mxGeometry x="0" y="12" width="960" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n2" parent="1" vertex="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10.5;fontColor=#607d8b;fontFamily=DejaVu Sans;" value=""Directly constructed from the A_SDU and the layer specific control information A_PCI.""> <mxGeometry x="20" y="42" width="920" height="16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n3" parent="1" vertex="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eceff1;strokeColor=#90a4ae;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#263238;fontFamily=DejaVu Sans;fontStyle=1;" value="MType
same as A_SDU"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="68" width="118" height="62" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n4" parent="1" vertex="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eceff1;strokeColor=#90a4ae;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#263238;fontFamily=DejaVu Sans;fontStyle=1;" value="SA
same as A_SDU"> <mxGeometry x="138" y="68" width="108" height="62" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n5" parent="1" vertex="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eceff1;strokeColor=#90a4ae;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#263238;fontFamily=DejaVu Sans;fontStyle=1;" value="TA
same as A_SDU"> <mxGeometry x="246" y="68" width="108" height="62" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n6" parent="1" vertex="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eceff1;strokeColor=#90a4ae;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#263238;fontFamily=DejaVu Sans;fontStyle=1;" value="TAtype
same as A_SDU"> <mxGeometry x="354" y="68" width="122" height="62" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n7" parent="1" vertex="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eceff1;strokeColor=#90a4ae;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#263238;fontFamily=DejaVu Sans;dashed=1;fontStyle=1;" value="[RA]
renamed from A_AE"> <mxGeometry x="476" y="68" width="128" height="62" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n8" parent="1" vertex="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eceff1;strokeColor=#90a4ae;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#263238;fontFamily=DejaVu Sans;fontStyle=1;" value="Length
same as A_SDU"> <mxGeometry x="604" y="68" width="108" height="62" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n9" parent="1" vertex="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff3e0;strokeColor=#f26f21;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#263238;fontFamily=DejaVu Sans;fontStyle=1;" value="A_PCI
added here"> <mxGeometry x="712" y="68" width="96" height="62" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n10" parent="1" vertex="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#546e7a;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#263238;fontFamily=DejaVu Sans;fontStyle=1;" value="parameter 1 … n
from the A_SDU"> <mxGeometry x="808" y="68" width="132" height="62" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n11" parent="1" vertex="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=9;fontColor=#607d8b;fontFamily=DejaVu Sans;" value="└────── A_Data ──────┘"> <mxGeometry x="712" y="134" width="228" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n12" parent="1" vertex="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f7f9fb;strokeColor=#b0bec5;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#263238;fontFamily=DejaVu Sans;" value=""> <mxGeometry x="20" y="162" width="920" height="66" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n13" parent="1" vertex="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontColor=#14337a;fontFamily=DejaVu Sans;fontStyle=1;" value="Difference from the A_SDU"> <mxGeometry x="34" y="170" width="892" height="16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n14" parent="1" vertex="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;fontColor=#263238;fontFamily=DejaVu Sans;" value="• Added: A_PCI — the Service Identifier (SI); on negative responses preceded by NR_SI = 0x7F."> <mxGeometry x="34" y="190" width="892" height="16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n15" parent="1" vertex="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;fontColor=#263238;fontFamily=DejaVu Sans;" value="• Renamed: A_AE → RA. • Dropped: A_Result. • Unchanged: MType, SA, TA, TAtype, Length."> <mxGeometry x="34" y="208" width="892" height="16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
svg.text: A_PDU — Application layer Protocol Data Unit (Clause 7.2)
"Directly constructed from the A_SDU and the layer specific control information A_PCI."
• Added: A_PCI — the Service Identifier (SI); on negative responses preceded by NR_SI = 0x7F.
• Renamed: A_AE → RA. • Dropped: A_Result. • Unchanged: MType, SA, TA, TAtype, Length.
